nasb.text: Then Ahaziah the son of Ahab said to Jehoshaphat, “Let my servants go with your servants in the ships.” But Jehoshaphat was not willing.

esv.text: Then Ahaziah the son of Ahab said to Jehoshaphat, “Let my servants go with your servants in the ships,” but Jehoshaphat was not willing.

cnv.text: 那時亞哈的兒子亞哈謝對約沙法說：“讓我的僕人與你的僕人一同坐船去吧！”但是約沙法不肯。

ccb.text: 后来，亚哈的儿子亚哈谢请求约沙法让他的人跟约沙法的人一起出海，但约沙法拒绝了。
